title: helichrysum benguellense
intro: Helichrysum benguellense, also known as Benguelense or Elephant's Tooth, is a perennial shrub belonging to the daisy family, native to the Angolan plateau in southern Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of terpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum benguellense include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
